subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the holy fragrances! Though until now the Pen hath not engaged in mentioning that servant of the Ancient Beauty, yet the heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب نفحات قدس هر چند تا بحال قلم بذکر آن بنده جمال قدم نپرداخت ولی قلب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @unity in diversity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
